git.last_commit: f1f5e94 feat: complete risk platform phase 4

stdout_tail: ok - createAuditEvent includes decision and evidence references for gate decisions
ok - classifyProviderFailure maps 401 to provider_auth_invalid
ok - classifyProviderFailure maps 429 to rate_limited
ok - classifyProviderFailure maps 503 to provider_upstream_failed
ok - classifyProviderFailure maps ENOTFOUND to network_unreachable
ok - classifyProviderFailure maps certificate revoked to tls_cert_revoked
ok - classifyProviderFailure maps proxy refusal to proxy_rejected
ok - classifyProviderFailure maps HTTP 407 to proxy_rejected
ok - classifyProviderFailure maps ECONNRESET to connection_interrupted
ok - classifyProviderFailure maps unexpected eof to connection_interrupted
ok - classifyProviderFailure maps issuer certificate chain failures to tls_handshake_failed
ok - ProviderRequestError preserves provider metadata
ok - adaptCheckResultToFindings converts violations into ReviewFinding records
ok - adaptCheckResultToFindings creates stable evidence ids from violation groups
ok - summarizeSeverityCounts counts findings by severity
ok - buildCheckRiskSummary orders critical findings first and exposes display locations
ok - adaptCheckResultToFindings uses bucket-specific recommendations
ok - buildReviewAuditPayload marks failed checks as denied review actions
ok - buildReviewAuditPayload keeps warn decisions as allowed actions with gate reason
ok - buildReviewAuditPayload carries finding and evidence references into details
ok - buildApprovalAuditPayload marks denied approvals and preserves subject context
ok - buildRepairAuditPayload stamps timestamp and keeps structured generation metadata
ok - buildRepairAuditPayload keeps repair issue stage and retryability for degraded proposal runs
ok - buildAuditQueryResult normalizes review, approval, and repair audit entries into one evidence timeline
ok - summarizeRecentAuditEntries keeps recent review and approval events in newest-first order
ok - buildRepairHistory keeps newest repair stages with state changes and retryability
ok - current review summary can be derived from latest check result
ok - buildCurrentReviewSummaryResponse returns empty when no review exists
ok - attachRepairIssueToCurrentReview exposes retryable provider degradation to the UI state
ok - attachProviderReadinessToCurrentReview exposes missing live provider prerequisites to the UI state
ok - current review derives require_approval when the strongest finding is high severity
ok - current review accepts a workspace review policy override for external delivery surfaces
ok - attachRepairProposalToCurrentReview preserves generation metadata for the UI
ok - attachRepairPreflightIssueToCurrentReview keeps the proposal visible while surfacing the issue
ok - attachRepairExecutionIssueToCurrentReview keeps rollback evidence for the UI
ok - buildCurrentReviewSummaryResponse includes the gate decision and generation metadata
ok - buildCurrentReviewSummaryResponse includes provider readiness when attached
ok - buildCurrentReviewSummaryResponse includes repair history when audit records are provided
ok - attachLiveRepairReadinessToCurrentReview exposes mock-browser runtime mismatch to the UI state
ok - buildWorkbenchQueue exposes the review-to-repair main path with contract-backed states
ok - buildWorkbenchQueue prefers audit-backed repair history when present
ok - buildWorkbenchQueue keeps empty-state steps out of missing/error wording when review is clean
ok - buildWorkbenchQueue surfaces retryable repair degradation as degraded instead of draft
ok - buildRepairWorkbenchSnapshot keeps clean reviews in a not-required empty state
ok - buildRepairWorkbenchSnapshot surfaces retryable issues, preflight summary, and repair history
ok - validateDeliveryConfig rejects env-backed provider config without env var
ok - resolveDeliveryPolicies loads workspace rule packages and disabled rule ids into one policy source
ok - buildDeliveryMachineReport returns machine-readable review, policy, audit, and automation status
ok - shouldFailDeliveryGate respects the configured decision threshold
ok - buildDeliveryInitFiles emits delivery manifest, rule package stubs, hook, and CI workflow
ok - buildDeliveryRuleSummaries flattens policy state for admin rule inspection
ok - searchDeliveryAuditRecords filters normalized audit records for admin search
ok - buildDeliveryDoctorReport highlights provider and gate blockers for admin diagnosis
ok - buildSpecialistAgentRuns routes findings to matching specialist agents
ok - buildSpecialistAgentRuns degrades the requested agent when execution failed
ok - aggregateAgentRuns deduplicates overlapping specialist findings and records conflicts
ok - finalizeMultiAgentReview exposes degraded reasons for downstream UI and audit
ok - summarizeProviderReadiness prefers inline keys when available
ok - summarizeProviderReadiness reports secure store readiness when settings key is empty
ok - summarizeProviderReadiness reports missing credentials when neither source is available
ok - createRepairPlan derives strategy, tests, and plan storage path from findings
ok - createRepairPlan keeps required_tests empty when there are no repair findings
ok - createRepairPlan adds a minimal git diff gate for critical config changes
ok - buildRepairGenerationMetadata summarizes provider and high-severity focus for audit
ok - getRepairGenerationBlocker rejects empty finding sets before provider generation starts
ok - getRepairGenerationBlocker rejects missing readable source files with evidence context
ok - deriveRepairFilePaths falls back to changed files when findings do not carry usable file paths
ok - deriveRepairFilePaths keeps finding-backed files and deduplicates overlaps
ok - parsePatchProposal accepts fenced JSON and builds deterministic operation ids
ok - parsePatchProposal rejects proposal summaries that are not human-readable
ok - parsePatchProposal rejects rationales that are only short tokens
ok - parsePatchProposal rejects operation summaries that stay at placeholder level
ok - createRepairIssue classifies missing provider key as a non-retryable provider_unavailable degradation
ok - createRepairIssue classifies authentication failure as non-retryable provider_auth_invalid
ok - createRepairIssue classifies upstream timeout as retryable timeout degradation
ok - createRepairIssue classifies HTTP 429 as retryable rate_limited degradation
ok - createRepairIssue classifies upstream 5xx as retryable provider_upstream_failed degradation
ok - createRepairIssue classifies dns/network unreachable as retryable network_unreachable degradation
ok - createRepairIssue classifies missing readable source files as non-retryable missing_evidence degradation
ok - createRepairIssue classifies ECONNRESET as retryable connection_interrupted degradation
ok - createRepairIssue classifies unexpected eof as retryable connection_interrupted degradation
ok - createRepairIssue classifies TLS certificate failure as non-retryable tls_handshake_failed degradation
ok - createRepairIssue classifies issuer certificate chain failure as non-retryable tls_handshake_failed degradation
ok - createRepairIssue classifies proxy rejection as retryable proxy_rejected degradation
ok - createRepairIssue classifies HTTP 407 as retryable proxy_rejected degradation
ok - createRepairIssue classifies certificate revoked as non-retryable tls_cert_revoked degradation
ok - createRepairIssue classifies socket hang up as retryable connection_interrupted degradation
ok - buildRepairIssueFromPreflight maps blocked gate decisions to policy_blocked issues
ok - buildRepairPreflightSummary exposes failed commands and blocking rule ids
ok - attachPatchProposal and approval transitions move the plan through the required states
ok - default repair policy includes a block rule for out-of-scope writes
ok - default review policy maps check.l5 to block and check.l4 to require_approval
ok - getReviewBucketDefinition centralizes category and recommendation for each review bucket
ok - default review and repair packages expose structured package metadata
ok - resolveRulePolicy returns a policy snapshot id derived from the active package set
ok - resolveRulePolicy accepts extension packages and disabled rules in one active rule source
ok - evaluateRepairProposal flags patch writes outside the finding scope
ok - inspectProviderReadiness short-circuits to inline readiness when settings key exists
ok - inspectProviderReadiness reports missing in mock mode without secure store lookup
ok - runRepairPreflight blocks proposals that write outside the repair finding scope
ok - inspectLiveRepairReadiness blocks mock browser mode even when an inline key exists
ok - inspectLiveRepairReadiness allows tauri workspace mode when provider is ready
ok - inspectProviderReadiness uses secure store result when settings key is empty
ok - inspectProviderReadiness degrades to missing when secure store lookup fails
ok - applyRepairPlan refuses to write when required tests fail during preflight
ok - generatePatchProposalFromModel parses model output into a structured proposal
ok - generatePatchProposalFromModel rejects operations outside the provided repair file set
ok - generatePatchProposalFromModel rejects no-op file rewrites
ok - generatePatchProposalFromModel rejects proposals that ignore critical finding files
ok - generatePatchProposalFromModel rejects proposals that only cover part of the high-severity file set
ok - generatePatchProposalFromModel rejects proposals that do not touch the high-severity finding line range
ok - generatePatchProposalFromModel accepts proposals that touch the high-severity finding line range
ok - generatePatchProposalFromModel rejects proposals that only touch part of a multi-line high-severity range
ok - generatePatchProposalFromModel rejects disjoint edits that only span across the risk range
ok - generatePatchProposalFromModel rejects whitespace-only edits on the high-severity finding lines
ok - generatePatchProposalFromModel accepts proposals that delete the high-severity finding line
ok - generatePatchProposalFromModel rejects comment-only edits when code on the high-severity line stays the same
ok - applyRepairPlan writes the proposal and rollbackRepairPlan restores the previous content
ok - applyRepairPlan rolls back already-written files when a later write fails
ok - applyRepairPlan reports rollback failures when cleanup cannot fully restore files
